title: Do you think the Human Instrumentality Project could happen
display_title: Do you think the Human Instrumentality Project could happen
wikitext:
[]: Do you think the Human Instrumentality Project could happen?             Quote Post by Tsukasa Shido » Thu Jun 30, 2005 8:04 pm What Im asking is if you belive that there could or ever would be a Human Instermentality Project. Yea I know its kinda a dumn ? but Im new and all so forgive me.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Jun 30, 2005 8:50 pm All I know is, if there was a way to do it, some slavering religious nut would eventually get their hands on the button, and press it while shrieking exultations to no one but themselves. (Can you say SEELE?) Also, I really, really wouldn't want to be a part of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jun 30, 2005 9:18 pm Well that depends on how literally your asking the question. I doubt that a giant Rei that melts everyone into goo could physically exist in this version of reality. I believe there are an infinite number of alternate universes , each representing another posibility, if what I think is correct , then maybe in another universe where some of the laws of physics are different it could happen. But certainly not here. If your just referring to merging everyones conciousness, I'm sure that sometime in the future a way to do this technologically will probably be developed.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Thu Jun 30, 2005 10:17 pm Defectron wrote: I doubt that a giant Rei that melts everyone into goo could physically exist in this version of reality.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jul 01, 2005 12:01 am If it happened all of a sudden, I wouldn't mind. Really, I wouldn't mind. No, I mean it -- I wouldn't mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Jul 01, 2005 12:03 am I'm not dead against it on principle, but when I look around at some of the people that I would have to become one with, then I feel kind of against the idea from a practical standpoint.

[]: Re: Would you belive if there ever was a Human Instermentali             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 01, 2005 12:09 am Tsukasa Shido wrote: What Im asking is if you belive that there could or ever would be a Human Instermentality Project. Yea I know its kinda a dumn ? but Im new and all so forgive me.

[]: Re: Would you belive if there ever was a Human Instermentali             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 1:11 am Mr. Bud wrote: Tsukasa Shido wrote: What Im asking is if you belive that there could or ever would be a Human Instermentality Project. Yea I know its kinda a dumn ? but Im new and all so forgive me.

[]: Re: Would you belive if there ever was a Human Instermentali             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 01, 2005 1:23 am Tsukasa Shido wrote: What Im asking is if you belive that there could or ever would be a Human Instermentality Project. Yea I know its kinda a dumn ? but Im new and all so forgive me.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 1:27 am Yeah that's pretty interesting stuff on that site. Kinda scary how advanced technology will be in the far future.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Fri Jul 01, 2005 9:11 am Isn't that kind of like those weirdos the Raelians? The ones who believe that this extraterrestrial Japanese guy came down and spoke to their prophet about Evangelionesque stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 11:49 am :shock: I didn't know about that!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 01, 2005 4:03 pm Mr. Bud wrote: Isn't that kind of like those weirdos the Raelians?

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Jul 01, 2005 5:38 pm That made my brain hurt :(

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Jul 01, 2005 11:47 pm rob_of_the_genesis wrote: That made my brain hurt :(

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Sat Jul 02, 2005 4:15 am I shall not do anything of that kind..

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 02, 2005 3:36 pm wow...and here i thought that nothing remotely like evangelion-esque organizations existed very interesting when did this all start?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 02, 2005 7:15 pm The Singularity Institute - about the turn of the century; but the idea of the accelerating future development of technology and its implications on the (super-)human future had been in discussion for at least a couple of decades previously.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 04, 2005 1:21 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The Singularity Institute - about the turn of the century; but the idea of the accelerating future development of technology and its implications on the (super-)human future had been in discussion for at least a couple of decades previously.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsukasa Shido » Wed Jul 06, 2005 7:34 pm Hey I was just wondering. I know that it is inpossible but Im just wondering.
